baseline.observed: CLI rejected --output with --no-export, but run_scan accepted output_path with write_markdown: false and returned a successful ScanResult with a warning.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because run_scan returned Ok with output_path: None and warnings instead of an error.

selected_candidate.name: API scan export conflict rejection
selected_candidate.reason: Align the run_scan API boundary with CLI export flag validation.
selected_candidate.success_metric: run_scan returns an error when output_path is provided while markdown export is disabled, and full local checks still pass.

safety_controls: The change is limited to src-tauri/src/lib.rs.
The new guard runs before source traversal and markdown rendering.
A focused unit test covers the API guard.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
